identity.core_philosophy: Revive the Classics. Play Online Forever.

rules: NO Gradients unless it's pure black-to-transparent
NO Blue, Green, or Teal colors
Use Red (#C8102E) sparingly for CTAs and key highlights only

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and game titles. Uppercase preferred.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, comments, and UI elements.

effects.texture: Use a subtle noise overlay or court-line pattern on black backgrounds.

hero.layout: Center focus with vault door visual

marketing.hero_button: bg-[#C8102E] text-white hover:bg-red-700 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(200,16,46,0.5)]
marketing.game_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#09090B] border border-white/10 hover:border-[#C8102E] transition-colors duration-300
marketing.nav_bar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10

admin.table: Shadcn Table component, customized with black bg and red accents
admin.form: Shadcn Form, Input, Label - styled with dark mode defaults

interactive.scroll_animation: Use 'framer-motion' for fade-in up effects on scroll
interactive.vault_door: Animate the vault door opening on load or scroll if possible (using CSS transforms)

hero_vault.usage: Hero section, central visual. Apply 'mix-blend-luminosity' or 'grayscale' if it has color, to ensure strict black/white theme.

background_texture.usage: Background overlay with opacity-10 to create subtle texture.

community_highlight.usage: Community section background or side image.

implementation_steps.step_1: Setup Global CSS variables for the strict palette in index.css.
implementation_steps.step_3: Build the 'Sticky Header' with Mobile Menu (Hamburger).
implementation_steps.step_4: Develop the Hero Section with the Vault Door image and 'glitch' text effect.
implementation_steps.step_5: Create the Games Grid using a Bento layout. Use dummy data initially.
implementation_steps.step_6: Implement the 'Community' section with MongoDB integration for comments.
implementation_steps.step_7: Build the Admin Panel (separate route /admin) with Authentication (can be mocked or simple basic auth).
implementation_steps.step_8: Add PWA manifest and service worker registration.
implementation_steps.step_9: Final Polish: Add 'framer-motion' scroll reveals and hover effects.

do_not: Use rounded buttons (keep them sharp/pill or slightly rounded-sm).
Use generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - write copy related to Basketball/Legacy.
must_do: Ensure text contrast is high (White on Black).
